name: Osso Buco/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the shanks in flour; brown with garlic in hot oil in a skillet.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the crockpot.
3. Stir to mix.
4. Add the shanks.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 10 to 12 hours until the shanks are tender.
6. Garnish with parsley.
7. Serve with pasta.
